goal: reconcile I1 implementation into canonical workflow branch

summary.title: 整合 I1 source adapter 实现
summary.what: Merged the verified I1 source adapter commit into the canonical workflow branch and updated the workflow registry/state to mark I1 complete and I2 ready.
summary.why: The canonical branch must contain the implementation commit and handoff before the storage/coverage slice starts from it.
summary.user_goal: reconcile I1 implementation into canonical workflow branch

decisions.chose: Merged worker commit f5357c2 into the canonical branch with merge commit 5b67ebf.
decisions.rationale: This preserves the worker commit that Mainline sealed under intent int_6bfea808 while adding it to the control branch.

decisions.chose: Marked I2 ready only after I1 handoff and canonical npm run check passed.
decisions.rationale: I2 depends on the adapter contract and should not start from stale or unverified branch state.

rejected.alternative: Cherry-pick I1 as a new commit
rejected.reason: That would create a different implementation commit hash from the one sealed by the I1 worker.

review_notes: Canonical verification after merge: npm ci then npm run check passed with 27 test files and 143 tests.
Initial canonical npm run check failed because dependencies were not installed; npm ci resolved it without package file changes.
No release, push, PR, global skill, or installed CLI changes.

architectural_claims: Canonical branch now contains the Codex source adapter boundary and compatibility facades from I1.
Workflow state now marks I2 as ready.
behavioral_changes: Codex parser and inventory are routed through the new source adapter while preserving current public imports and behavior.
security_implications: No Claude Code adapter was added or exposed.
migration_notes: No DB migration in this checkpoint; I2 owns source-aware storage migration.
